summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OSTI Engenharia property inspection app with all requested customizations. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI fully customized with OSTI branding, Portuguese interface, and proper room organization. All core inspection workflows working perfectly.

design_issues.issue: Área Externa option mapping - shows 'varanda' internally but 'Área Externa (Varanda)' in UI
design_issues.note: Functionality works correctly, just minor labeling inconsistency

passed_tests: Backend: All 7 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Backend: OSTI branding in API responses
Dashboard: OSTI Engenharia logo correctly displayed
Dashboard: Title 'VISTORIA DE RECEBIMENTO DE IMÓVEL' correct
Dashboard: Portuguese status tabs (Todas, Em Andamento, C/ Ressalvas, Aprovadas, Reprovadas)
Dashboard: Delete buttons (trash icons) present and accessible
Checklist: All 5 required rooms present (Sala, Cozinha, Banheiro, Área Externa, Quarto)
Checklist: Room items in correct order per ROOM_TEMPLATES
Checklist: Successfully created 'Banheiro 2' with proper numbering
Checklist: Room addition modal with type selection
Integration: Frontend-Backend API calls working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider standardizing 'Área Externa' vs 'varanda' naming in add room modal options for consistency. All critical functionality is working perfectly.
